faq.title: We answer what we are asked most

items.q: How do you quote a shipment?
items.a: You get a proposal in less than 24 hours from your dedicated account manager. We need: origin, destination, type of cargo, volume and target lead time. We quote a total door-to-door rate with no surprises.
Yes. We manage all 9 IMO/IATA classes with certified documentation, labeling and packaging. We coordinate with carriers and airlines authorized for your specific cargo.

items.q: Do you have offices outside Chile?
items.a: Not directly, but our network of correspondent agents covers 70+ countries. We work with verified partners who operate under the same standards we apply in Chile.

items.q: How long does customs clearance take?
items.a: Between 24 and 72 business hours from cargo availability, depending on the regime and product. As an AEO we have a preferred green channel and we review documents before arrival to avoid delays.

items.q: Can you manage my full supply chain?
items.a: Yes. We design end-to-end supply chains: from the purchase at the supplier at origin to final delivery to the customer. A single point of contact, a single consolidated account.

items.q: How do you monitor the shipment?
items.a: Our own platform unifies data from carriers, airlines and agents into a single shareable URL. You receive automatic alerts at every milestone and your account manager is available 24/7.

nosotros.title: People. Trust. Results.
nosotros.lead: We are a Chilean team with global connections and a commitment to treat you as our only client.
nosotros.heroLead: We are a Chilean logistics operator. We don't sell a service: we operate with every client as if it were our own operation.

manifesto.titleHtml: Logistics is a relationship, not a commodity.
manifesto.p1Html: We have spent more than two decades operating in the Chilean logistics world and we learned something simple: cargo doesn't move by itself. Behind every container, every AWB, every DUS, there are people making decisions under pressure.
manifesto.p2: That's why we built LOG ATM the opposite way from the rest of the industry. Instead of a call center rotating agents, we assign a dedicated account manager per client. Instead of hidden fees, we show every cost component. Instead of promising everything, we tell you first what might go wrong.
manifesto.p3Html: Today we operate in 70+ countries, with clients across 12 industries and a retention rate of 98%. But we still measure ourselves by the same question from day one: would the client feel that this operation is their own?

items.desc: LOG ATM is born with a focus on customs and air freight from Santiago.
Launch of our ocean unit with the first contracts in Asia.
We obtain the Authorized Economic Operator certification.
We launch our end-to-end cargo visibility platform.
Specialized Dubai · Jeddah connection with local partners.

values.title: 4 values that defend the operation
values.desc: The principles we apply on every decision, from quoting to solving a contingency at 3 AM.

items.title: Operational closeness
items.desc: We are not a provider: we are your extended logistics team.

items.title: Tailored to you
items.desc: Every account has an operation designed for its reality.

items.title: Full transparency
items.desc: Clear rates, no surprises. If anything fails, we say it first.

items.title: Continuous improvement
items.desc: Measurable KPIs and quarterly reviews with every client.

how.title: A simple, transparent and tailored model
how.desc: We don't sell pre-packaged products. We design every operation from scratch in four clear steps, with an account manager who walks with you from start to finish.

items.title: Dedicated account manager
items.desc: A person assigned to your account who knows your operation, products and timing. Single point of contact, no call centers.

items.title: Operational diagnosis
items.desc: We map your current chain: origins, destinations, volumes, critical times and pain points. We detect cost overruns and bottlenecks.

items.title: Tailored route design
items.desc: We propose modes, carriers, airlines and agents based on cost, time and risk. We negotiate rates and document everything.

items.title: Operation and reporting
items.desc: We execute every shipment with full visibility, proactive alerts on deviations and weekly cargo-in-transit reports.

cotizar.title: Get a quote in 4 steps
cotizar.lead: Tell us about your operation and receive a clear proposal in less than 24 hours.
cotizar.heroLead: Receive a clear, itemized proposal in less than 24 business hours, with your dedicated account manager assigned.

step1.title: How do we move your cargo?
step1.sub: If you are not sure, pick one and we will adjust it in the proposal.

step2.title: Where from and where to?
step2.sub: If your origin is not listed, type it in the notes section later.

step3.title: What are we going to move?
step3.sub: Check all types that apply — they can be combined.

step4.title: Who do we send the proposal to?
step4.sub: A dedicated account manager replies, not a bot.
step4.placeholderNotes: Product details, critical deadlines, special requirements...
